# listing — Start _(HTML/CSS)_


```html
<ol class="listing" start="3">
	<li class="listing-item">
		<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
	</li>
	<li class="listing-item">
		<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
	</li>
	<li class="listing-item">
		<div class="listing-item-content">
			item
			<ol class="listing" start="3">
				<li class="listing-item">
					<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
				</li>
				<li class="listing-item">
					<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
				</li>
				<li class="listing-item">
					<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
				</li>
			</ol>
		</div>
	</li>
</ol>
```
